node.text: Melanie bought figurines that remind her of family love.
Melanie and her kids finished a painting before the conversation.

node.text: Melanie enjoys family beach trips with her kids once or twice a year.

node.text: Melanie appreciates Caroline's passion for helping kids and finds her inspiring.
Melanie created a painting inspired by autumn.
Melanie treasures the memory of her youngest child taking her first steps.

node.text: Melanie appreciates and admires Caroline's courage as a trans person.
